prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2025年第48名，2026年降至第62名，排名小幅下滑 ，对考生报考信心略有削弱；2026年高考周期内该校未出现显著声誉舆情事件；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，短视频曝光一般；近年无投档线断档或暴跌 记录，报考心理预期平稳；该校以石油石化特色见长，石油与天然气工程为传统王牌学科（第四轮学科评估A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等亦为 优势领域；第五轮学科评估数据中该校未收录，但行业认可度仍较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热，但该校招生以石油化 工类为主，相关专业社会热度一般；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约39.12万）略有增加，物理类考生估算约25.1万人，竞争小幅加剧；省 控线方面，2025年物理类本科批426分，较2024年437分下降11分，卷面难度或有所降低；该校位于北京，在湖北省招生规模稳定（70余人），属跨省招生；北京 高校对湖北考生有一定吸引力，但近年地域偏好无明显变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年后移趋势、招生计划持平、软科排名小幅下滑、本省物理类考生略增及省控线 下降等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，最低位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约18448名，区间17948–18948名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 18754 → 15469 → 16685 → 18418, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. In 2023, it moved sharply forward to 15469, then fell back to 16685 in 2024, and further shifted backward to 18418 in 2025, a backward shift of about 1733 compared to 2024. The baseline for 2025 is about 18418. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 71 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 74 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 74, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 48th in 2025 but dropped to 62nd in 2026, a slight decline that somewhat weakens candidates' confidence. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no significant reputation incidents occurred. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 100, with average short video exposure. In recent years, there have been no records of cutoff line drops or crashes, so the psychological expectations for applications remain stable. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum and natural gas engineering as its traditional ace discipline (A+ in the fourth round of discipline evaluation). Chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering are also advantageous fields. Data from the fifth round of discipline evaluation is not included, but industry recognition remains high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, but the university's enrollment is mainly in petrochemical majors, which have average social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hubei Gaokao is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200 for Physics + History categories). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 251,000, leading to a slight intensification of competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 426 points, down 11 points from 437 in 2024, indicating a possible decrease in exam difficulty. The university is located in Beijing, with a stable enrollment scale in Hubei (over 70 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Beijing universities have some appeal to Hubei candidates, but regional preferences have not changed significantly in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, slight decline in Soft Science ranking, a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and a decrease in the provincial control line, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the minimum ranking shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 18448, with a range of 17948–18948.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17948–18948, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17900), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Petroleum Engineering (Carbon Neutral Energy Innovation Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 18900), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3877 → 3988 → 3996 → 4120 → 3911. Over the past 5 years, the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 3877 and 4120. In 2025, it moved forward by about 209 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of approximately 3911 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 7 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 6 in 2025, and further reduced to 5 in 2026, a decrease of about 16.7% compared to 2025. The reduction in supply theoretically eases competition and moves the ranking forward.\ n211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking ranked 48th in 2025, dropped to 62nd in 2026, a slight decline, slightly weakening the confidence of liberal arts candidates in applying.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university had no significant reputation incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity did not enter the national top 100; no record of admission line breaks in recent years, stable application psychology; the university is strong in science and engineering, with only two liberal arts majors: English and Ideological and Political Education, no A-level liberal arts advantageous disciplines, limited overall appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the English major is generally lukewarm, while the Ideological and Political Education major is stable; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 142,500, slightly increased from 141,400 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 442 points, up 10 points from 432 in 2024, indicating intensified competition; the university is located in Beijing, with a very small enrollment scale in Hubei (5–7 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; Beijing's location has some appeal to liberal arts candidates, but the small number of applicants makes ranking fluctuations susceptible to individual candidate choices.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as enrollment reduction (supply decrease moves ranking forward), provincial control line increase and slight candidate increase (competition intensification moves ranking backward), and Soft Science ranking decline, the reduction effect and competition intensification effect partially offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 3540, with a range of 3040–4040.
